case_title: UBIWE K ERIYE VS. DELTA AIRLINES INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-07-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE CLERK THAT HE WILL DISMISS HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT ITN CORP. WHO HAS NOT BEEN SERVED, AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ITN CORP. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES WAS REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY A NEALE--PARALEGAL. PARTIES HAD AGREED TO COURT MEDIATION WHEN CASE DID NOT SETTLE, PLAINTIFF ASKED FOR CASE TO BE CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ITN CORP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ERIYE, UBIWE K AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES INC. ITN CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY A. NEALE--PARALEGAL. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIYE, UBIWE K AS TO DEFENDANT ITN CORP
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERIYE, UBIWE K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-21-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT ITN CORP
